framework.name: MCP Initially Shipped Without Auth
framework.description: MCP's initial design had no authentication — it was added later via community feedback (PR 133, PR 646). This confirms the ad-hoc nature of agent auth (gap_6) and suggests even leading protocols are retrofitting security rather than designing it in.
framework.raw_quote: its initial design did not include authentication, but subsequent community feedback and technical discussions have led to the active integration of authentication and authorization considerations
